title: Deyeuxia pilosa
intro: Deyeuxia pilosa, also known as Xue Shanzha in Chinese, is a type of perennial grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis, cardiovascular disease, and cancer. The bioactive constituents of Deyeuxia pilosa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, the plant is made into herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and infusions, which are often used to promote immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve overall health.
taxonomy: Deyeuxia pilosa is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as true grasses. The genus Deyeuxia belongs to the subfamily Pooideae. Deyeuxia pilosa is a type of cool-season grass native to the mountainous regions of China. The classification of Deyeuxia pilosa reflects its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom. It is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta.
